output.summary: SmearGate+BigramHash core with sliding-window eval, pairing val-only STE int6 QAT/compression with standard mixed int6/int8 export and fp16 passthrough.
output.valOnlyReasoning: CombinedOptimal val-only submission trained solely on validation shards per the val-only regime.
techniques: SmearGate+BigramHash backbone with stride-64 sliding-window evaluation
Val-only STE fake-int6 QAT plus mixed int6/int8 post-quantization and zstd-22 compression
Standard track mixed int6/int8 export with fp16 tok_emb+c_k passthrough, Muon WD0.04, and SWA50
